Headline: #82 Kimball-Homan Temporary Northbound Reroute near Homan/Douglass
ShortDescription: Northbound 82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted via Central Park, Roosevelt, Homan and over regular route, due to street blockage near Homan/Douglass

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #82 Kimball-Homan buses are temporarily rerouted via Central Park, Roosevelt, Homan and over regular route, due to street blockage near Homan/Douglass.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Howard-bound Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: Howard-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem near Fullerton. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Howard-bound Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem near Fullerton. 

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
